page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5-c28g1.7xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance designed for workloads requiring parallel processing capabilities. It features 28 dedicated Intel Xeon E5-2682 v4 physical cores operating at 2.5 GHz on an x86_64 architecture. The instance is equipped with 112 GB of system memory, providing 4 GB per core. Acceleration is delivered via a single integrated NVIDIA Pascal P100 GPU with 16 GB of VRAM. Local storage consists of a 472 GB SSD, and the instance has a baseline network bandwidth of 5 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks reveal a clear contrast between single-core and multi-core or GPU-accelerated operations. Single-core CPU performance is relatively weak, with stress-ng single-core and single-threaded decompression tests scoring in the bottom 10% and 25% respectively. However, multi-core CPU performance and memory bandwidth fall into the average tier. Notably, the hardware excels in LLM inference tasks; prompt processing for both small (135M) and medium (7B) models, as well as text generation for the medium model, achieve top-tier performance, placing in the top 10% of benchmarks.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.gn5-c28g1.7xlarge offers a cost-effective entry point for GPU-accelerated workloads by utilizing mature hardware architectures like Intel Xeon E5 v4 and NVIDIA Pascal. The primary tradeoff is the lower single-core CPU performance, which makes it less suitable for highly sequential, single-threaded tasks. However, the combination of dedicated CPU cores, local SSD storage, and dedicated GPU acceleration makes it highly suitable for medium-scale machine learning inference, parallel data processing, database operations, and multi-threaded computing workloads.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5-c28g1.7xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 28 dedicated Intel Xeon E5-2682 v4 cores running at 2.5 GHz, 112 GB of system memory, and a single NVIDIA Pascal P100 GPU with 16 GB of VRAM. It includes 472 GB of local SSD storage and a 5 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Benchmark data indicates weak single-core CPU performance, but average multi-core and memory bandwidth capabilities. The instance excels in LLM inference, with prompt processing and text generation for medium-sized models reaching top-tier performance levels. This hardware profile represents a cost-effective option for parallel processing workloads, though it presents a tradeoff in single-threaded execution speed. It is best suited for machine learning inference, multi-threaded database operations, and parallel data processing tasks.

meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5-c28g1.7xlarge features 28 Intel cores, 112 GB RAM, a 16 GB NVIDIA P100 GPU, and 472 GB SSD for GPU-accelerated workloads.
tagline: A GPU-accelerated instance combining dedicated Intel Xeon processors, local SSD storage, and NVIDIA Pascal architecture for parallel computing workloads.
bullet_points: 28 dedicated Intel Xeon E5-2682 v4 cores and 112 GB of system memory.
Single NVIDIA Pascal P100 GPU with 16 GB of VRAM for parallel acceleration.
472 GB of local SSD storage and 5 Gbps baseline network bandwidth.
Top-tier performance in LLM inference prompt processing and text generation.
Weak single-core CPU performance offset by average multi-core capabilities.
Well-suited for machine learning inference and multi-threaded database tasks.
